---
title: "From Zero to Website with Quarto"
author: Charlotte Wickham
subtitle: Cascadia R Conf 2026
brand:
  color:
    palette: 
      blue: "#186897"
      orange: "#b2672d"
      light-grey: "#eee"
    primary: blue
  typography: 
    fonts: 
      - family: Crimson Text
        source: bunny      
      - family: Atkinson Hyperlegible
        source: google
    base: Atkinson Hyperlegible
    headings: 
      family: Crimson Text
      color: blue
    monospace:
      size: 0.8em
    monospace-inline: 
      color: orange
    monospace-block: 
      background-color: light-grey
format: revealjs
---
